zh.Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, King: 法國波特-哈倫斯維安盧希南
zh.lifeSummary: 當Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay於1110年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易波代時，她的父親Geoffrey de Rançon20歲，母親Fossefie Moncontour30歲。她於1140年與Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old在法國波代豐特納勒-孔特結婚。他們至少是9個兒子的父母。她去世於1169年4月11日在法國努維勒-阿吉泰維安盧希南享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay于1110年出生在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易波代时，她的父亲Geoffrey de Rançon20岁，母亲Fossefie Moncontour30岁。她于1140年与Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old在法国波代豐特納勒-孔特结婚。他们至少是9个儿子的父母。她去世于1169年4月11日在法国努維勒-阿吉泰維安盧希南享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rancon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Carlos, Miguel, Antonio, Francisco, Manuel, Jesus, Luis, Pedro, Jorge, Raul, Roberto.
Spanish (Rincón): habitational name from any of numerous places called (El) Rincón, from rincón ‘corner’, a word of Arabic origin.

nameMeanings.name: Bourgoyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bourgoin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphee, Alyre, Andre, Armand, Aurore, Celina, Emile, Gilberte, Jacques, Laurent, Lucienne, Olivier.

variant of Bourgouin (and, in North America, an altered form of this), a habitational name for someone from Burgundy (Old French Bourgogne), a region of eastern France having Dijon as its center. The area was invaded by the Burgundii, an ancient Germanic tribe from whom it takes its name, in about AD 480. The duchy of Burgundy, created in 877 by Charles II, King of the Western Franks, was extremely powerful in the later Middle Ages, especially under Philip the Bold (1342–1404; duke from 1363). Compare Bourgoyne and Bourguignon .

en.lifeSummary: When Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay was born in 1110, in Vendée, Pays de la Loire, France, her father, Geoffrey de Rançon, was 20 and her mother, Fossefie Moncontour, was 30. She married Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old in 1140, in Fontenay-le-Comte, Vendée, France. They were the parents of at least 9 sons. She died on 11 April 1169, in Lusignan, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, at the age of 59.

fr.Vendée, Pays de la Loire, France: Vendée, Pays de la Loire, France
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay est née en 1110, à Vendée, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Geoffrey de Rançon, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Fossefie Moncontour, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old en 1140, à Fontenay-le-Comte, Vendée, France. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils. Elle est décédée le 11 avril 1169, à Lusignan, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.Vendée, Pays de la Loire, France: Vendée, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay 1110 in Vendée, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Geoffrey de Rançon 20 und ihre Mutter Fossefie Moncontour 30. Sie hat 1140 in Fontenay-le-Comte, Vendée, Frankreich Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne. Sie starb am 11. April 1169 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Lusignan, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay è nata il nel 1110 nel Vendée, Pays de la Loire, Francia, sua padre, Geoffrey de Rançon, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Fossefie Moncontour, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old nel 1140, nel Fontenay-le-Comte, Vendée, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli. Morì il 11 aprile 1169, nel Lusignan, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 59 anni.

ko.Vendée, Pays de la Loire, France: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 븐드e
ko.lifeSummary: Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay(이)가 1110년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 븐드e에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffrey de Rançon(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Fossefie Moncontour(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1140년 프랑스 븐드e 폰텐아이-레-코트에서 Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1169년 4월 11일 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 비니 루시그난에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay nasceu em 1110, em Vendée, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Geoffrey de Rançon, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Fossefie Moncontour, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old em 1140, em Fontenay-le-Comte, Vendée, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos. Ela faleceu em 11 de abril de 1169, em Lusignan, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, com 59 anos.

ru.Vendée, Pays de la Loire, France: вендe, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay родилась в 1110 г. в местности вендe, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Geoffrey de Rançon было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Fossefie Moncontour, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old в 1140 г. в местности фонтенеи-ле-комт, вендe, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей. Она умерла 11 апреля 1169 г. в местности лусигнан, виенн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay nació en 1110, en Vendée, Pays de la Loire, Francia, su papá, Geoffrey de Rançon, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Fossefie Moncontour, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old en 1140, en Fontenay-le-Comte, Vendée, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos. Murió el 11 de abril de 1169, en Lusignan, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 59 años.
